_notes: Battle-map authoring data for Frontier Town (tutorial, spine node 'start'). rev 6: WIDE-tier remake. Art via two-pass generation (Gemini flash 3.5, style ref = rev 4 art): pass 1 terrain-only (road/palisade/gates/clearings), pass 2 edit adds the town; the passes were pixel-stable outside additions, enabling composite surgery (out-of-walls caravan additions restored selectively, wide barn removed to free the inside-west slot, west camp house/cart erased to free the camp-side clearing). Sparkle removed at (946,350) 1024-space. Graded (grade B: V-gamma 0.75, sat x1.15, warm +5% -- owner-picked standard, see docs/MAP_ART_PIPELINE.md) and shipped 2x nearest-neighbor upscaled: all coordinates below are in 2048x868 shipped-pixel space (paint space was 1024x434). Grid 30x13 (~68px cells; houses ~2 cells = compressed size ladder). Road traced from the building-free pass-1 mask; through town the lane rides the road's NORTH half so units render in front of south-row rooflines -- occluders empty ON PURPOSE (route audit verified vs goblin/boss sprite heights). 8 slots hand-placed from owner markup 2026-07-12. levelDef pairing: enemySpeedMult 0.85 (~23s crossing over ~31 cells), enemyScaleMult 1.25 (map-scoped unit upsize).

leak.landmark: east road past the caravan camp
